modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't log into Fleet Commander with Microsoft Authenticator.

full_description_text:  
I'm having trouble logging into Fleet Commander using the Microsoft Authenticator app. It says I have 2-factor authentication set up, but I don't even have that account on my devices. It's super frustrating because I need to access it, but I can't get past the login screen.
short_description: Can't log into Fleet Commander with Microsoft Authenticator.
description: I'm having trouble logging into Fleet Commander using the Microsoft Authenticator app. It says I have 2-factor authentication set up, but I don't even have that account on my devices. It's super frustrating because I need to access it, but I can't get past the login screen.
